Use the following static program-analysis elements as the main reasoning anchors.
These elements are static only; they do not reveal the correct output, branch outcomes, or gold execution trace.

8. SliceControlDependency at L228: control predicate over res, minimo (if (res < minimo))
9. SliceAssignment: assignment/update influencing minimo
